string.name: challengeAFriend
string.comment: be mindful how 'friend' translates in gendered languages. look for a more neutral term if there's an issue, or base your translation on a different phrase like 'invite to a game'. keep it short and convey the button's meaning without offense.

resources.string: Inki num digirih arcibissuh, ta URL acuya
Hinnay ku sadeyni ta QR mudenta ixxoy
Qagitaak xoqoysil assam xiqta gexkalit URL
Maytani yasgaarawi faxe num koo gexkalit too hunun farmooma.

plurals.name: opponentLeftCounter
plurals.item: Ku sadeyni digir cabeh. Atu nammeyhaytoh addah mayso essertam %s duuddah.
Ku sadeyni digir cabeh. Atu mayso sekenxitteh addat essertam %s duuddah.

resources.string: Ku sadeyni digir cabeh. Atu mayso essertam duddah, digirih muucisso intaah, akkek qammaltam duddah.
